# Diagonale Tutorials

## Load Diagonale
Diagonale needs to be added to your MATLAB path. You can do this by running the following command in the MATLAB command window:

TO DO

## Structure the data

TO DO

## Decide and validate dimensions

TO DO

## Decide and validate analysis

TO DO

## Run analysis

TO DO

## Store results

TO DO

## Create figure

TO DO

## Store figure

TO DO
